title: Magic Cookie Bars
ingredients: **Preheat the oven to 350° (325° for glass dish)**
instructions:
In a 13 x 9 baking dish, melt the butter in the oven.
Sprinkle the cracker crumbs over the melted butter.
Pour the condensed milk over the crumbs.
Top evenly with the remaining ingredients. Press down firmly and bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool.
Chill thoroughly. Cut into bars and serve.
